hero.title: Kuwoneka makora
hero.lead: IATF imagwira ntchito pagulu mwachisawawa. Zisankho za polojekiti, kusintha kwama code, kusintha kwa kayendetsedwe, ndi ndalama zogwirira ntchito zimalembedwa m'malo opezeka anthu ambiri. Tsambali likulemba komwe mtundu uliwonse wa mbiri umakhala ndi momwe ungawerengere.

header.title: Uko Kuli Mbiri Izo Zili Kulembeka

items: Vinthu ivyo vikukhumbikwa pa mulimo. Kuzomera, kusunga, na kusinthira vinthu, vikulongosoreka nga ni nkhani mu malo ghakusungirako vinthu, ndipo vikulembeka mu kabuku ka ŵanthu wose. kalemberaNkhaŵa na citima comene .

Pemphani mabuku. Nkhani zakupempheka zikusungika mu gulu la IATF GitHub, pa webusayiti iyi, panji paŵose. Nkhani zikulongosora mwakudumura, kusinthika, panji kusintha ivyo vikalembeka pakwamba mwakuti ivyo vikukhumbikwa kuti munthu waŵe wakufikapo viwoneke kwambura kuvumbura vinthu vyambura kukhumbikwa.
Mauthenga ghakusintha. Kusintha kose kwa code ni public commit pa repository iyi. View the IATF Gulu la GitHubNkhaŵa na citima comene .
Vinthu vikusintha pa umo boma likwendeskera vinthu. Vinthu ivyo vikulembeka pa webusayiti iyi vikulongosoreka para vyalembeka. Webusayiti ya IATF Ŵazgani nkhani iyi. lembani mdauko pa GitHub.

Ndalama zakugwilira ntchito. IATF imasunga ndalama zogwirira ntchito ndipo imalemba ndalama zomwe zimachitika mobwerezabwereza. Kuyambira 2022, ndalama zomwe zimabwera nthawi zonse zakhala mayina amtundu. Kukonzekera kwagwiritsa ntchito zomangamanga zaulere kapena zotsika mtengo momwe zingathere. Onani mbiri ya mtengo wogwirira ntchito pansipa.

Fundo zakukhwaskana na umo vinthu vikwendera. Zindikirani kuchokera ku ndondomeko iliyonse yogwirizanitsa kapena chisankho chikukhala mu GitHub Zokambirana pa malo osungirako oyenera view Kudumbiskana pa Webusayiti ya IATF malo ghakusungiramo vinthu.

paragraphs: IATF imasunga zomangamanga zake zazing'ono mwadala. Kuyambira 2022, ndalama zoyendetsera ntchito zakhala zikugwiritsidwa ntchito kwambiri.
Nkhani iyi ni lipoti la ndalama yayi, kweni ni ndondomeko ya ndalama izo ŵanthu ŵakugwiliskira ntchito kuti IATF yilutilire kugwira ntchito.
operatingCosts.footnote: Maadiresi gha munthu, umo wakupelekera ndalama, na vinyake vyambura kukhumbikwa pa nkhani ya ndalama, vikusangika yayi mu kabuku aka.

items.label: Vimanyikwiro
items.value: Mtengo wa Domain wakupelekeka na mugiwarafx. Hosting yikagwiliskiranga ntchito free-tier panji low-cost infrastructure kwizira mu Cloudflare. iatf.cc chigaŵa.

items.label: Vimanyikwiro
items.value: Ndalama zakwendeskera webusayiti iyi zikufuma ku mugiwarafx.

items.label: Vimanyikwiro
items.value: Mtengo wa domain wakulipidwa ndi mugiwarafx. Hosting imagwiritsa ntchito zomangamanga zaulere kapena zotsika mtengo kudzera ku Vercel.

items.label: Vimanyikwiro
items.value: Ndalama zakwendeskera webusayiti iyi zikufuma ku mugiwarafx.

items.label: Vimanyikwiro
items.value: Mtengo wa domain wakulipidwa ndi mugiwarafx. Hosting imagwiritsa ntchito zomangamanga zaulere kapena zotsika mtengo kudzera pa Masamba a GitHub.

header.title: Vinthu ivyo ni vya ŵanthu wose yayi

paragraphs: Vinthu vinyake vikuŵa na cilato cakuti vileke kusangika mu mabuku gha boma:
items: Vimanyikwiro vya awo ŵakukhumba kunjira sukulu iyi.
Makalata ghapadera agho ghakulembekera waka ŵanthu kuti ŵapulikiske ivyo ŵapempheka pambere ŵandazomerezge, kukana, panji kulongosora mwakudumura.
Maadiresi gha pa nyumba, manambara gha foni, na vinyake vyambura kukhumbikwa.
Cinthu cilicose ico cingawovwira kuti munthu wamanye uyo wakugwiliskira nchito vinthu ivi kwambura kuzomerezgana nayo.
Nkhani za Raw Discord, pokhapokha ngati uthenga winawake wasamukira ku mbiri ya polojekiti.

paragraphs: Usange mukukhumba kupulikiska umo ntchito zikupokelerekera, kusungika, panji kutumizgikira kunyake, ŵerengani pa peji lakuti governance.
